$comment: CS-FIXTURES — GROUND TRUTH for the DETERMINISTIC voice-calibration proposer (engine/voice-calibration/propose.js proposeVoiceCalibration). Drama signal is high in competitor landscape but own brand voice is established low — ANTI-PATTERN, do not raise drama_dial.
